textByHashes.48baad662a43c789a90bcb57cac031956614f171: I hope the food's better here than it was last time.
textByHashes.13a01134f1ba3afed16109dea9711264a82d6116: Perrdur and I are having a nice romantic dinner, aren't we dear?
textByHashes.7e52a71b0087269714d283f53af4401e647c49d6: We are celebrating the anniversary of our marriage, aren't we dear?
textByHashes.de7d6b2aa94a5f61efb46e356cc333580e52383e: And we are having a very enjoyable time, aren't we dear?
